description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof and a light-colored exterior, set on a rectangular plot of land with a grassy yard. The house features a prominent front entryway with a covered porch supported by columns and a set of wide steps leading up to the main door. Windows are arranged asymmetrically on all sides, with a mix of single and double-pane styles, providing ample natural light. The roof is dark gray and extends over both the main structure and a side extension, which appears to function as a garage or carport. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light beige or cream stucco, contrasting with the darker roof and trim. The overall design is modern suburban, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, light stucco walls, and a covered front porch with steps and columns. Asymmetrical windows and a side extension add to its suburban character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, asymmetrical windows, and the side extension/garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back extension and additional windows, with the yard extending behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the continuation of the hip roof over the side extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a single main door
